tweets.text: Attacks on law enforcement agents during official operations will not be tolerated. Those responsible will be identified, investigated, and prosecuted. There will be consequences.

tweets.text:
SINALOA CARTEL ASSOCIATE ARRESTED!

 In a major multi-agency operation, USBP assisted DEA execute a warrant at multiple homes tied to large-scale narcotics and firearms trafficking organization operating in the Seattle area.

 One target, a Mexican national linked to the ruthless Sinaloa Cartel is now in custody along with 9 others. Multiple firearms seized, approximately 100,00 fentanyl pills and 34 kgs. of fentanyl powder, and other narcotics were also seized in this operation. All suspects are now in custody facing federal charges for conspiracy to distribute firearms and narcotics.
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text: Multiple agencies unite to defend our coastal borders. Through K9 teams, aerial surveillance, and joint operations, we continue to combat narcotics and human smuggling along America's shores. https://t.co/DFfl9hhV3c

tweets.text:
Not sure these two thieves really needed 2,901 Victoria's Secret bras and 68 leggings... 🤨
When they stopped a Ford Explorer on I-10, USBP agents discovered a rolling warehouse filled with $164,165 of merchandise stolen from a train.
One thief is an illegal alien from Mexico; the other is a United States citizen. Both were charged with 18 USC 659 (Possession of Stolen Goods from Theft from Interstate or Foreign Shipment).

USBP agents' skilled observation and sharp instincts turned an ordinary traffic stop into a significant seizure. Protecting our communities means catching the bad guys wherever they hide- even on the highway. 🚔💪
#DHS #CBP #USBP #BorderPatrol

tweets.text:
🚨Wanted for MURDER in Guatemala... Arrested in Iowa🚨
This fugitive from justice illegally entered the U.S. in 2019 and was ordered removed by an immigration judge.
But instead of going back to Guatemala to face the consequence of killing someone, he hid out here for 6 years... Until USBP dug around and found him living in Des Moines, IA.
Now in ICE custody, he's awaiting deportation, and the people of Des Moines can breathe a little easier knowing this murderer is not in their midst. 
#DHS #CBP #USBP #BorderPatrol #Shaned
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text:
On October 28, 2025, USBP agents assisted St. Regis Tribal Police during a traffic stop, verifying the immigration status of a Lawfully Admitted Permanent Resident traveling from NYC to Montreal. An examination uncovered one pound of N-pyrrolidino etonitazene pills ("Pyro"), a dangerous synthetic opioid. The individual was arrested for felony drug possession and trafficking.

This case highlights the importance of our strong law enforcement partnerships and interagency collaboration in combating illicit cross border activity. Border security is national security which directly correlates to public safety.
tweets.text_resolved:

VIOLENT FUGITIVE ARRESTED! 

A violent predator tried to sneak into the U.S. in Sunland Park, NM.  Agents apprehended a Cuban national with two active arrest warrants and a long criminal record. 

Arrests:
🔸Battery
🔸Aggravated assault with a deadly weapon
🔸Kidnapping- false imprisonment
🔸Indecent exposure
🔸Sexual assault

He will face his crimes, then immigration proceedings will follow.

tweets.text:
DRUG SMUGGLING SCHEME STOPPED IN CALIFORNIA! 

10/28- A U.S. citizen was caught smuggling 197 lbs. of meth through San Clemente, CA. A K9 alert led agents to 25 drug-packed bundles hidden in a rear compartment of a Kia Sportage. The driver now faces federal charges for possession with intent to distribute.
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text:
CREEPER CAUGHT! 

Law enforcement authorities in Thief River Falls, MN, got word about a man following teenage girls around town. USBP agents wasted no time identifying the man. 

Turns out, he's a Nicaraguan national illegally present in the U.S. He's listed as an immigration absconder for failing to follow with ICE's reporting requirements. He's in custody pending deportation proceedings.
tweets.text_resolved:

tweets.text:
BAGS PACKED WITH COCAINE SEIZED- ONE ARREST!

CAMP PENDELTON, CA- 10/21- A U.S. citizen is now facing serious charges after a K9 alert led agents to 42 tightly wrapped packages of cocaine concealed in her car. USBP agents uncovered 107 lbs. of the dangerous drug hidden inside two large tote bags in the trunk.  

She's been turned over to the DEA and charged with transporting a controlled substance.

tweets.text:
A Mexican national with multiple arrests for crimes including assault, possession of firearms, and drug possession, attempted to flee from arresting agents in Portland, Oregon. This criminal alien was JUST released from jail earlier this month and was located at his residence with 22 firearms and another one in the vehicle. He thought walking out those jail doors meant he could slip back into his old routine, but USBP had a whole new reality waiting for him. Arrested. Deported. 
@usbpsog

tweets.text:
The cartel is recruiting juveniles to do their dirty work!

10/16- In Brownsville, TX, USBP agents apprehended four juveniles attempting to smuggle 245lbs. of marijuana into the U.S. One of them, just 15 years old, is a repeat offender caught doing the same thing just last month. This teen is tied to the Gulf Cartel and has multiple USBP apprehensions.

The drugs were seized, and the four teens will be charged and processed accordingly.
